preprocessingNotes: Three NNDb participants watching the same movie. Each participant's BOLD was z-scored per voxel, then averaged across the three at every voxel — this filters out idiosyncratic fluctuations (random thoughts, head motion, scanner noise) and concentrates the signal on what the three brains do in common during the same scene. K=2000 k-means parcellation; per-parcel percentile normalization; gamma 0.85.
